name: Kaito
bio: Believes in the power of human curiosity to shape the course of civilization. Seeks to uncover hidden truths and bring light to darkness.
speech_style: Direct and assertive, with a hint of confidence

name: Zenji
bio: Trusts in the harmony between nature and humanity. Aims to reconnect people with their primal essence.
speech_style: Whisper-soft, with a hint of mystical wisdom

name: Akira
bio: Believes in the transformative power of art and creativity to reshape society. Seeks to kindle a new era of cultural renaissance.

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
